channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: BECROWNED launches this fall
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Psychological survival horror game gets a release window.

Psychological survival horror game BECROWNED will launch for PC via Steam this fall, publisher Top Hat Studios and developer 13th Street Games announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

A surreal survival horror set in a world where fears come alive, and danger lurks at every turn. Explore the ruins of an ancient kingdom, fight monsters, and try to survive in this brutal world. Will you become its savior, or will you seek to destroy it? The choice is yours.

Key Features

  • The World Woven From the Nightmares of a Distant Past – Sinners, heretics, and even gods—this merciless, twisted world is a prison for those who truly deserve punishment. Face their deepest fears and nightmares as this world brings them to life. In this place, there are no innocents, no kindness, and no mercy. Will you prove this truth or will you challenge it?
  • Classic Survival Horror – Explore locations filled with secrets. Solve puzzles, manage your resources wisely, and avoid unnecessary fights. Who knows what terrible creature might be lurking around the next corner…
  • A Drama About a Man Who Became a Prisoner of His Own Ambitions – Richard Torrance is a man who will do anything to get what he wants. Не is a man of strong will and unbreakable character. He is rational and cold-blooded. Richard strives to shape the world to his liking. Despite his efforts, he has never achieved what he truly desires – happiness. What led him to a world of endless suffering? Uncover the mysteries of the protagonist’s past to find out.
  • Varied Gameplay – Explore a vast castle and its surroundings, discover hidden passages and optional puzzles. Battle a variety of enemies, each requiring a unique fighting strategy, and defeat challenging bosses. Survive this nightmare. No matter the cost!
  • A Nonlinear Storyline and a Living World That Responds to the Player’s Choices – You will face countless choices, each impacting the fates of others imprisoned in this world. Will you spare a repentant killer? Will you risk your resources to save a random martyr from a gruesome death? Is it worth the cost? You will suffer the consequences. The game features multiple endings, ranging from happy to a true nightmare. Will you walk the path of a hero, or just kill ’em all? The choice is yours.
  • Technologically Advanced Retro Style – Modern technology, blended with a distinct retro style, creates captivating visuals that convey both the horrors and the beauty of the game’s world.

Watch a new trailer below.

A Kingdom by the Sea Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/becrowned-launches-this-fall
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Twinkle’s Galactic Tour ‘Wildest Dream’ trailer
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Latest look at the PS1-style retro tribute game.

Publisher Top Hat Studios and developer Molegato have released a new trailer for 3D platformer Twinkle’s Galactic Tour dubbed “Wildest Dream.”

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

Travel the galaxy to rescue Twinkle’s debut concert’s audience in a low-poly, 90s anime styled, musical platforming adventure!

Play each level to the beat of a song as enemies, platforms and items all move following the beat, the melody or the drums. Uncover musical minigames or explore the personal story of an struggling (but never surrendering!) young aspirant singer.

Galaxy Round Tour

Explore neon-and-pastel alien cities, travel on Twinkle’s best friend and roadie Bav’s space van, help the locals by completing missions, sample the local cuisine or shop around for useful gear or fashionable costumes!

Collect Everything

Optional objectives in levels like finishing one try, time trials or finding the hidden CDs will grant you materials to craft power ups and tools. Find lots of secondary missions and hidden items in the open cities and return to previous areas once you’ve got new tools to reach new places!

Experience Twinkle’s and each character’s narratives through completing missions and the ‘hangout system’, in a story that is all about what it feels trying to make it out in life as an artist.

Loving the Art

Will Twinkle catch the culprit and serve justice? Find out her footing in the harsh career of music? Which friends will you choose to make? Maybe even find your love in the midst of it all?

So be a star and help Twinkle and her friends save everyone beat after beat, song after song!

Twinkle’s Galactic Tour will be available for PC via Steam. A release date has yet to be announced.

Watch the trailer below.

Wildest Dream Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/twinkles-galactic-tour-wildest-dream-trailer
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: 2D pixel art horror action game METAMORPHOSIS to be published by Top Hat Studios
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Explore a dead world using any tools at your disposal.

Top Hat Studios will publish luxan-developed 2D pixel art horror action game METAMORPHOSIS, the companies announced. It will be available for PC via Steam.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

METAMORPHOSIS is a brutal 2D pixel art horror game focused on exploration, navigate a dead world using any tools at your disposal.

You play as Aria, a nun branded a sinner, seeking absolution. Journey toward the Golden Star and reach the last paradise left in the world.

Demo

This demo offers a glimpse of the full game, letting you explore a minimal version of the opening area, try out a variety of weapons, find secrets and die at the hands of fearsome demons, included in the demo:

  • Three unique weapons.
  • 15 enemies.
  • Two bosses.
  • 30 different items ranging from tools, equippable armors, to powerful spells casted by your faith.
  • 28 different songs.

Watch a new trailer below.

Publisher Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/2d-pixel-art-horror-action-game-metamorphosis-to-be-published-by-top-hat-studios
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: The Backworld demo now available
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Story-rich horror RPG due out in 2026.

A demo for The Backworld, a turn-based RPG with narrative-driven horror elements, is now available for PC via Steam, publisher Top Hat Studios and developer Numor Games announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via Top Hat Studios:

A surreal, story-rich, horror RPG, The Backworld plunges players into a cosmic adventure where reality is crumbling. As you slip between dimensions, you’ll explore over 100 diverse areas ranging from terrifying, liminal spaces to traditional JRPG-inspired fantasy worlds to horrors beyond your wildest imagination. Survival requires strategic decision-making; whether that means engaging in combat, sneaking past threats, or utilizing environmental hazards is up to you. Along the way, keep an eye on your sanity; your experiences with increasingly surreal horrors will affect your sanity and dynamically alter gameplay, causing characters to lose control or the player to experience hallucinations such as fake NPCs and user interface glitches.

The Backworld is due out for PC via Steam in 2026.

Watch a new trailer below.

Demo Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/the-backworld-demo-now-available
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Cel-shaded aerial roguelike action game DELIVERY MUST COMPLETE to be published by Top Hat Studios
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Deliver a package through the heart of a chaotic warzone.

Top Hat Studios will publish Yoyoyollie-developed cel-shaded aerial roguelike action game DELIVERY MUST COMPLETE, the companies announced. It will be available for PC via Steam.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

DELIVERY MUST COMPLETE—Devil May Cry meets Ace Combat. a high speed Ace-like roguelike with SSSTYLE. Cut across cel-shaded, action-packed, arcade-paced dogfights as you fly, fight, and upgrade your roster of kickass planes. Every battle is massive, every location is procedural, and every fight is a spectacle—whether it’s aircraft, blimps, dragons or mechs.

Be Stylish, Be a Spectacle, Be an Ace

Weave, destroy, dodge, and parry everything that comes your way. Earn style points and enhance your style ranking by flying like a true ace. The stage is all yours, show the enemy your moves!

A Different Sky Each Time

Every map is procedurally generated and no two fights are alike: Weather changes, cloud cover variation, terrain anomalies, and random map events among four distinct environmental zones change the battlefield each time you play.

Burn Through the Skies

Make sharp turns and aggressive plays by Drifting, because angle of attack is just a suggestion to you. Boost forward and cut through clouds, leaving everything in the dust. No, it’s not your plane. You are just built different.

Complete Your Delivery

You’re the Courier.

Your mission? Deliver the package.

The destination? Right in the middle of an all-out warzone, where elite fighter squadrons from across the globe swarm the sky all united for the noble goal of glory and peace… with only you to get in their way, again and again and again.

Crashing and burning is just a temporary inconvenience for you, however: Warp tech will pull you back.

No matter how far you fly, no matter how long it takes, no matter how many elite pilots they send after you, nothing will stop you from finishing your goal.

The DELIVERY MUST COMPLETE. (Hopefully before it gets cold!)

Watch a new trailer below.

Publisher Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/cel-shaded-aerial-roguelike-action-game-delivery-must-complete-to-be-published-by-top-hat-studios
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
